<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox enemy
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
<% if (it.internalName) { -%>
|internal_name=<%~ it.internalName %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.enemyType) { -%>
|enemy_type=<%~ it.enemyType %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.tagsText) { -%>
|tags=<%~ it.tagsText %>
<% } -%>
|can_be_despawned=<%~ it.canBeDespawned %>
}}<section end="infobox" />
<% if (it.hasStatsSection) { %>
<section begin="stats" />
<%~ it.statsSection -%>
<section end="stats" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasVariantsSection) { %>
<section begin="variants" />
<%~ it.variantsSection -%>
<section end="variants" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasLootSection) { %>
<section begin="loot" />
<%~ it.lootSection -%>
<section end="loot" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Enemies]]
<% if (it.typeCategory) { -%>
[[Category:<%= it.typeCategory %>]]
<% } -%>
<% for (const tag of it.tags) { -%>
[[Category:<%= tag %> Enemies]]
<% } -%>
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated enemy source pages]]
